data: {"types":[{"id":0,"description":"These services and technologies are necessary for using our website's basic functions, including accessing secure areas. This information also lets us know whether you would like to remain logged in, granting you quick access to our services on subsequent visits.","title":"Required","parties":[{"id":0,"label":"Chrono24","hasConsent":true,"required":true},{"id":9,"label":"Riskified","hasConsent":true,"required":true},{"id":11,"label":"AccessiBe","hasConsent":true,"required":true},{"id":13,"label":"CloudFlare","hasConsent":true,"required":true}]},{"id":1,"description":"We collect and analyze anonymized data so that we can improve our services. This allows us to track user numbers, see how users interact with our website, and optimize our website's content.","title":"Analytical/Performance","parties":[{"id":1,"label":"Chrono24","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":7,"label":"Google Analytics","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":33,"label":"Google Tag Manager","hasConsent":true,"required":false}]},{"id":2,"description":"These services and technologies help us provide you with personalized content. This enables us to show you listings and advertisements that correspond to your interests.","title":"Targeting","parties":[{"id":2,"label":"Chrono24","hasConsent":true,"required":false}]},{"id":3,"description":"We use these services and technologies to make our website more user-friendly. For example, this information is used to remember previous searches so that you can access them on future visits. It also enables us to identify users who may need support so that a customer service agent can reach out to them via a chat window.","title":"Functional","parties":[{"id":3,"label":"Chrono24","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":10,"label":"Hotjar","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":22,"label":"Solvemate","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":34,"label":"Google Tag Manager","hasConsent":true,"required":false}]},{"id":5,"description":"These services and technologies help us provide you with personalized content. This enables us to show you listings and advertisements that correspond to your interests, even on third-party websites.","title":"Marketing","parties":[{"id":8,"label":"Google Ad Manager","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":14,"label":"Meta","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":15,"label":"Bing","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":23,"label":"Google Ads","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":27,"label":"LinkedIn","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":30,"label":"Compulse","hasConsent":true,"required":false},{"id":35,"label":"Google Tag Manager","hasConsent":true,"required":false}]}]}
